recentFeedback.feedback: Work Tracker was crashing browser with 17k DOM elements - fixed with pagination and virtual scrolling
recentFeedback.implication: Data layer must handle large datasets gracefully. Pagination + deduplication are essential for scaling.

recentFeedback.feedback: Nox Builds cleanup completed - likes organized folder structure
recentFeedback.implication: Regular maintenance and organization of workspace improves efficiency

workThatLanded.what: Work Tracker Fix: Pagination + Deduplication + Virtual Scrolling
workThatLanded.why: Eliminated 17k DOM element crash. Backend now serves /api/activities?limit=100 with deduplication (5-min window). Frontend renders only visible items.

lessonsLearned.lesson: No pagination = guaranteed failure at scale. Always implement pagination, deduplication, and virtual scrolling for data-heavy dashboards.
Learning cycle protocol requires reviewing conversations, updating STATE.json, doing one improvement, and spawning auditor - not just updating heartbeat counters.
